subcodes.first_line: The verses have been sent down and the Hidden Treasure hath been made manifest, yet the people perceive not. Lo, the Fire of Utterance hath been kindled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات و ظهر الکنز المخزون ولکن القوم لایعرفون قد اشتعلت نار البیان
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @consolation and comfort
